empty.activity: No activity has been recorded yet.
empty.notes: No notes have been created yet.

home.title: Collaborative screenwriting foundation
home.description: Courier Draft is a server-rendered collaboration platform for screenplay teams, built around Express, Nunjucks, Tailwind, MongoDB Atlas, and Socket.IO scaffolding.
home.architectureBody: This repository starts from a clear route map and realtime contract so later epics can plug into stable HTTP, fragment, and socket surfaces.

login.title: Sign in
login.heading: Sign in to Courier Draft
login.description: Google OAuth routes are scaffolded, and local development can use the seeded bypass when it is enabled.
login.googleDisclaimer: The full OAuth exchange is intentionally deferred to a later epic.
login.devDescription: Use a seeded local user so the app shell, authz, and e2e flow can run before the real OAuth implementation lands.

oauth.title: Google OAuth scaffold
oauth.heading: Google OAuth is scaffolded, not completed
oauth.description: This route exists so the later auth epic can plug in the real OAuth exchange without changing the public surface.

oauthCallback.title: OAuth callback scaffold
oauthCallback.heading: OAuth callback placeholder
oauthCallback.description: The callback route is wired for later work, but the real token exchange is intentionally deferred to a future epic.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.heading: Workspace dashboard
dashboard.description: This shell shows real seeded projects and durable activity while the deeper business flows are still scaffolded.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.heading: Inbox foundation
inbox.description: Invite and notification plumbing will expand in later epics. The fragment route already exists for no-React swaps.

settingsProfile.title: Profile
settingsProfile.heading: Profile settings
settingsProfile.description: Profile fields are available now through the `/api/v1/me` foundation endpoint.

settingsPreferences.title: Preferences
settingsPreferences.heading: Preferences
settingsPreferences.description: Locale switching is fully wired through cookies, templates, and persisted user preferences.
settingsPreferences.formHint: The form below posts to `/locale`; the API path persists the same preference through `/api/v1/me/preferences`.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.heading: Project creation scaffold
newProject.description: The durable create-project flow belongs to a later business epic, but the SSR entry page is ready now.

newScript.title: New script
newScript.heading: Script creation scaffold
newScript.description: Editors and owners can already reach this page; the actual creation mutation remains HTTP-scaffolded in the API.

projectOverview.heading: Project overview
projectOverview.description: Core workspace surfaces are wired around real project membership and script records.

projectMembers.heading: Project members
projectMembers.description: Current membership and roles for this project.

projectActivity.heading: Project activity
projectActivity.description: Recent durable activity already has a real model and list surface.

projectAudit.heading: Project audit log
projectAudit.description: Owner-only operational history for later release hardening.

projectCharacters.heading: Character registry
projectCharacters.description: Canonical project entities will grow here as later epics land.

projectLocations.heading: Location registry
projectLocations.description: Location entities are scaffolded with real storage and indexes.

projectSettings.heading: Project settings
projectSettings.description: Owner-only settings are routed and protected now, with business mutations deferred to later epics.

script.heading: Script overview
script.description: Outline, scenes, and editor entry points are connected to real models and placeholder APIs.

editor.heading: Editor shell scaffold
editor.description: The collaborative editor itself is deferred, but the shell, room contract, and role-aware editability are ready.
editor.canEdit: This user can edit in future collaboration flows.
editor.readOnly: This user joins the scene in read-only mode.

todo.title: Foundation placeholder
todo.heading: This surface is scaffolded
todo.description: The route, authz, and rendering path are ready for a later epic.

invites.heading: Invites
invites.empty: No invites are waiting right now.

activity.heading: Activity feed
activity.empty: No project activity has been recorded yet.

members.empty: No members are available for this project.
